references.reason: The repaired boundary is first visible without Tenshi present, protecting the condition that repair was not performed for an audience.
A bold pale seam across black stone makes repair legible without pretending the crossing never occurred.
An empty unmarked tray shows work happened while refusing trophy or credit imagery.
The cart route visibly reopened before Tenshi arrives provides independent evidence of repair.
The journal records unwitnessed repair, no credit demand, a visible seam, and strain repaired only through practice.
